name: Steven Waslander
exact_department: Institute for Aerospace Studies (UTIAS) & Electrical & Computer Engineering (ECE)
recent_papers: Data-Driven Environmental Lighting Compensation for Visual Odometry and SLAM
Advancing Autonomy in Small Aerial Vehicles
Enabling Multi-Robot Team Operation with Minimal Supervision
interest_paragraph: My interest in Professor Waslander's work is particularly drawn to the intersection of Multi-Robot Coordination and Control and Autonomous Aerial Vehicle Navigation, which aligns perfectly with my background in robotics and AI agent development. I am especially intrigued by research exploring data-driven approaches for environmental lighting compensation in Visual Odometry and SLAM, as this addresses critical real-world challenges in robotic perception. The prospect of contributing to projects focused on enabling multi-robot team operation with minimal supervision and enhancing the capabilities of small autonomous aerial vehicles is highly motivating for my graduate studies.
